title: Spray N Wipe | Antibacterial Spray Cleaner | 750ml (18 Pack) | Kitchen & Bathroom Anti Bac Cleaner | Antiviral Surface Sanitiser | Test & Certified | Sanitising Effect up to 28 days
features: ✅ MULTI PURPOSE SURFACE SANITISER CLEANER - Spray n Wipe is a sanitiser spray cleaning product that can be used as a kitchen cleaner, bathroom cleaner, around the home, at work or on soft furnishings and fabric. Spray n Wipe gives you peace of mind that your surfaces are free from harmful bacteria and viruses. Our formula leaves no harsh chemical residue.

✅ QUICK ACTING & LONG LASTING FORMULA – Spray n Wipe is an anti bac cleaning spray that quickly sanitises your surfaces of all germs. Our sanitiser is a quick acting and fast-drying. The residual sanitising effect can last up to 28 days.

✅ SCIENTIFICALLY PROVEN TO KILL BACTERIA & VIRUSES – Our surface sanitiser disinfectant spray has an antibacterial and antiviral formula. This unique formula is effective at killing greater than 99.99% of bacteria and viruses.

✅ OFFICIALLY TESTED & CERTIFIED – Spray n Wipe has received four official European Standards certifications. This surface sanitiser passes European standard BS EN 1276 (antibacterial protection) & (BS EN 14476 (antiviral protection) , BS EN 1650 (antifungal protection – tested against Candida albicans) and BS EN 13697 (Spray Wipe Test).
🇬🇧 PRODUCED IN THE UK – We pride ourselves on our British heritage, from design to formulation to packaging. Safe Hands is proudly produced to the highest standards in the United Kingdom.
description: Question: Does this product contain alcohol?Answer: No, this product does not contain alcohol. Question: Is this product scented?Answer: No, this product is not scented. Question: Where can this product be used? Answer: This product is suitable for use in any location including home, work, shops, schools, restaurants and offices. Question: Does this product leave a nasty residue on the surface after use? Answer: Our unique formula leaves no harsh chemical residue on the surface after cleaning. Question: How long does the sanitising effect last? Answer: The residual non contact sanitising effect of this product can last up to 28 days. Question: What certification does this product have? Answer: This product has been fully tested and certified to BS EN 1276 (antibacterial protection) & (BS EN 14476 (antiviral protection) , BS EN 1650 (antifungal protection – tested against Candida albicans) and BS EN 13697 (Spray Wipe Test). Question: Can this product can be sprayed on soft furnishings and is it safe? Answer: Yes, this product can be sprayed and is safe for use on soft furnishings. For best results after spraying please allow to dry before use.
